description: Insider x buyback double-signal confluence. Reads insider-buys-enriched + buyback-scanner outputs, finds tickers with both signals fresh, scores composite weighted by N insiders, $ value, recency, % market cap, FCF cov. Quality gate >$500M market cap. Edge basis: Jenter-Lewellen 2018, Peyer-Vermaelen 2009 ~70% hit on +15-25%/6-12mo. Daily 23 UTC.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Insider x buyback double-signal confluence daily 23 UTC
